paper_title: Development of a novel method for identification and quantification of birch pollen allergens in parallel

methods.method_name: Birch Pollen Allergen Identification and Quantification
methods.description: A novel method developed for the simultaneous identification and quantification of birch pollen allergens, aimed at improving the accuracy and efficiency of allergen detection.

steps.description: Collect birch pollen samples from various geographic locations.
steps.searchable_summary: collect birch pollen samples from multiple locations

steps.description: Prepare pollen samples for analysis by cleaning and isolating allergenic proteins.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and isolate allergenic proteins from pollen samples

steps.description: Use mass spectrometry to identify allergenic proteins in the samples.
steps.searchable_summary: identify allergenic proteins using mass spectrometry

steps.description: Quantify the identified proteins using a calibration curve.
Validate the method by comparing results with known standards.
steps.searchable_summary: validate method by comparing with standards
